title: Jackson Lake and Teton Mountains Wyoming
description: Union Pacific Railroad Pictorial Post Card. This is the region of historic Jackson Hole, hide-out of frontier day outlaws, now the location of many fine modern Dude Ranches. Grand Teton National Park includes the soaring Teton Range.

Modern seamanship - a new version of old salts spinning yarns
description: Some of our boys get together for a relaxing moment from their arduous wartime duties aboard ship. They swap stories of former expeditions, engagement and fun ashore and afloat.

title: A PT squadron of the U. S. Navy
description: The patrol torpedo squadron is the new wolf pack of the United States Navy. These powerfully engined torpedo boats are fast as lightning and have a 4050 horsepower. They are entirely seaworthy and capable of long voyages.

title: A heavy cruiser of the U. S. Navy
description: In the new technique of war, the heavy cruiser, second only to battleships in power, operates with long range submarines and bombers as the eyes of the fleet.

title: A light cruiser of the U. S. Navy
description: A most important part of naval warfare is played by these fast, deadly, light cruisers. They carry sixteen 5-inch dual purpose guns in eight twin mounts and eight 21-inch tubes in fours.

title: Training submarine crew, U. S. Navy
description: This old type "O" submarine is now being used by the U. S. Navy in the training course given submarine crews. It has all the modern, scientific improvements and instruments aboard for training purposes. This view shows the submarine just as she starts up her diesels, ready to get underway.

title: Mighty battleship of the U. S. Navy
description: This is one of the queens of the U. S. fleet. A powerful, deadly weapon of war and one of our first line of defense. Its huge guns are capable of more destruction than hundreds of bombers.

Public library and new Old South Church, Boston, Mass.
description: Public Library and the New Old South Church are located in the Back Bay of Boston in Copley Square. The Public Library is designed after the style of the Italian Renaissance, the interior of the building is of great beauty and visitors come from all parts of the world to admire it. Famous murals by Pierre Cecile Puvis de Chavannes, Edwin Austin Abbey and John Singer Sargent will hold you spellbound.
